Handees

Artisan Terms of Use

Last Updated: March 2026

1. Our Relationship

Handees is a technology platform connecting independent, verified artisans with clients. You are joining Handees as an independent contractor, not an employee. You are solely responsible for your own taxes, tools, and work execution.

2. Verification & Fraud

By submitting an application, you guarantee that all provided information (including your NIN, union credentials, and guarantor details) is 100% accurate.

  • Zero Tolerance: Supplying a fake NIN, a forged certificate, or a fraudulent guarantor will result in a permanent ban from the Handees network.

3. Community Safety & Active Monitoring

Handees invests heavily in maintaining a network of elite, trustworthy professionals. While we act as an intermediary, we actively monitor the health and safety of our platform.

  • Continuous Vetting: Our verification process does not end at onboarding. We continuously monitor client feedback and dispute reports.
  • Our Commitment to Clients: We assure our clients that we take commercially reasonable steps to keep bad actors off the platform. If you compromise this trust through theft, property damage, fraud, or unsafe practices, Handees will not only terminate your account but will actively cooperate with local law enforcement and provide your verified NIMC and Guarantor records to assist in any investigations.

4. Guarantor Liability

You confirm that the guarantor listed in your application has agreed to vouch for your character and professional conduct. Handees reserves the right to contact this individual during your vetting process and in the event of severe disputes or abandonment of client projects.

5. Platform Conduct & Offboarding

To remain on the Handees network, you must maintain a high standard of professional conduct. Handees reserves the right to suspend or permanently terminate your access to the platform (and the associated WhatsApp community) at any time, without prior notice, for:

  • Receiving multiple verified complaints from clients regarding poor workmanship or unprofessional behavior.
  • Attempting to bypass the platform's payment or communication protocols.
  • Engaging in theft, harassment, or any illegal activity while on a job sourced through Handees.

6. Limitation of Liability

Handees provides the platform "as is." We are not legally liable for any injuries, property damage, or financial losses incurred while you are executing a job sourced through our platform.
